message:
fix(cli,wasm): validate font-size and numeric SVG config overrides, rejecting NaN/Inf/zero/negative values

CLI: Adds parse_positive_font_size_arg clap value_parser that rejects zero,
negative, NaN, and infinite values at argument parse time. Adds
normalize_positive_font_size() that filters invalid values before they reach
FontMetrics or SvgRenderConfig. build_svg_render_config now normalizes font
size before applying. Three new tests verify rejection at parse, normalize,
and SVG config levels.

WASM: merge_svg_config now validates all numeric override fields (font_size,
avg_char_width, line_height, padding, rounded_corners) with is_finite() and
positivity/non-negativity guards, silently ignoring invalid values instead of
propagating them into rendering. New test
merge_svg_config_rejects_invalid_numeric_overrides_by_ignoring_them verifies
all five fields are preserved at their base values when overrides are invalid.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
